audit_metadata.app_name: Change In Youth CIC - Team Management & Financial Platform

critical_blockers.title: Test-login endpoints exposed in production
critical_blockers.description: Unauthenticated /api/auth/test-login endpoints allow unauthorized access to any role without credentials
critical_blockers.impact: Complete authentication bypass, unauthorized access to all features
critical_blockers.validation: No /api/auth/test-login routes remain in production code

critical_blockers.title: Database schema mismatch - missing chat_id field
critical_blockers.description: socialMediaSubmissions table missing required chat_id field, causing INSERT failures
critical_blockers.impact: Test failures, data insertion failures in production
critical_blockers.fix_applied: Added chatId field to schema: chatId: int('chat_id').notNull()

critical_blockers.title: Test import path resolution failures
critical_blockers.description: 4 test files cannot resolve @/ and @shared/ path aliases, causing test failures
critical_blockers.impact: Tests fail to load, CI/CD pipeline breaks
critical_blockers.fix_applied: Created vitest.config.ts with proper path alias resolution
critical_blockers.validation: vitest.config.ts includes alias mapping for @/ and @shared/

critical_blockers.title: TypeScript strict mode disabled
critical_blockers.description: strict: false allows unsafe type coercion, null/undefined issues, and implicit any
critical_blockers.impact: Type safety gaps, runtime errors, security vulnerabilities
critical_blockers.fix_applied: Enabled strict mode and all strict checks (noImplicitAny, strictNullChecks, etc.)
critical_blockers.validation: tsconfig.json strict: true with all strict flags enabled

high_risk_issues.title: CORS reflects arbitrary origins
high_risk_issues.description: CORS middleware reflects request origin without validation, vulnerable to CSRF attacks
high_risk_issues.fix_applied: Implemented origin whitelist with ALLOWED_ORIGINS env var
high_risk_issues.validation: Only whitelisted origins receive CORS headers

high_risk_issues.title: Console logs expose sensitive data
high_risk_issues.description: Session tokens, user emails, and auth details logged to console in production
high_risk_issues.impact: Sensitive data exposure in logs, security breach
high_risk_issues.fix_applied: Replaced console.log with pino structured logging (no sensitive data)
high_risk_issues.validation: All console.log statements removed from server code

high_risk_issues.title: Missing environment variable documentation
high_risk_issues.description: Deployers don't know which env vars are required, causing deployment failures
high_risk_issues.fix_applied: Created comprehensive .env.example with all required and optional variables

high_risk_issues.title: Deprecated punycode module will break in Node.js 24+
high_risk_issues.description: Dependencies use deprecated punycode module, incompatible with future Node versions
high_risk_issues.impact: App breaks on Node.js 24+, deployment blocker
high_risk_issues.recommendation: Run: npm audit fix --force (breaking changes acceptable)

high_risk_issues.title: npm audit shows 12 remaining vulnerabilities
high_risk_issues.description: 9 moderate + 3 high severity vulnerabilities (xlsx has no fix available)

vulnerabilities.issue: arrayLimit bypass allows DoS via memory exhaustion
Arbitrary file overwrite and symlink poisoning

vulnerabilities.fix: NO FIX AVAILABLE - consider alternative library

high_risk_issues.recommendation: Run: npm audit fix && npm audit fix --force

medium_risk_issues.title: Test failures in invoice-generation and performance-ranking
medium_risk_issues.description: 3 tests failing due to schema changes and missing test data
failing_tests: invoice-generation.test.ts: No unpaid activities to invoice
performance-ranking.test.ts: Field 'chat_id' doesn't have a default value

medium_risk_issues.title: TypeScript strict mode generates 230 errors
medium_risk_issues.description: Enabling strict mode reveals type safety issues throughout app code
medium_risk_issues.impact: Type safety gaps, but not blocking deployment
medium_risk_issues.recommendation: Review and fix type errors incrementally or add @ts-expect-error with justifications

low_risk_issues.title: Missing error boundary for database connection failures
low_risk_issues.description: Database connection errors not gracefully handled in some endpoints
low_risk_issues.recommendation: Add try-catch with structured error logging

low_risk_issues.title: No rate limiting on API endpoints
low_risk_issues.description: API endpoints lack rate limiting protection

security.verification: Check ALLOWED_ORIGINS env var is set

dependencies.command: npm audit fix && npm audit fix --force

next_steps: 2. Run: npm audit fix && npm audit fix --force (fix vulnerabilities)
3. Run: npm test (verify all tests pass)
7. Deploy to staging for final validation

summary.reason: Database migration pending, tests need verification, vulnerabilities need final fix
